concerns.text: The plan cites a specific URL for the 'education' domain only: `https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ray368/GateMem/resolve/main/gatemem/data/education/checkpoints.jsonl`. However, the Functional Requirements (FR-001) and User Stories mandate evaluation across four domains (medical, office, education, household). The plan assumes the dataset structure is consistent and that other domain files exist in the same repository structure without verifying their actual presence or providing specific URLs for them. If the repository only contains the education file (or uses a different naming convention for other domains), the pipeline will fail to load the required data for the other three domains, invalidating the comparative study. The plan must explicitly verify the existence and accessibility of the specific files for medical, office, and household domains or define a robust discovery mechanism that does not rely on unverified assumptions about repository structure.
